text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and Agnes Digital has
arrived, gingerly holding a pack of chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer! So, are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Today, we give praise for the beautiful ships in our lives—and you would not believe the amount of love I poured into these Valentine's chocolates!
choice_data_list: Who are you giving them to?
Who are you giving them to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We are offering them to my shrine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She genuinely isn't giving them to anyone. Agnes
Digital sets up a merch shine in my office and lays
down her offerings...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Bon appétit, my Umamusume. Eat to your heart's
content in my imagination...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Even though they aren't eating my chocolate for real, I can still picture the look on their faces... Mmm-mmm-mmm...
choice_data_list:
Why not give chocolate to the racers
themselves?

Why not give chocolate to the racers
themselves?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: U-unthinkable! I can't give to my idols!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's say that I did. That would be making myself
noticeable to them, and they might even feel
obligated to give me something in return.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not to mention how egotistical it is to presume that my feelings are worth communicating to them at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Simping should be done from afar, so I merely
look respectfully and celebrate discreetly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital doesn't want to draw attention
from those she worships, so I suppose this
alternative is all right.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All righty, Trainer. I've finished my prayer, so let's
eat up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Now that we've finished making our
offering, stage two is where we eat the chocolates
and discuss how precious our oshis are.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, I am truly blessed. I never thought fate
would bring me a companion I can share my love
of Umas with!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now, don't hold back today—open up your
heart and spill everything. Tell me... who's your
favorite oshi these days?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you mine. Recently, I just absolutely can't
stop thinking about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Gaaahh... Actually, there's no way I can
choose! There are too many!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital swoons in ecstasy as we indulge in
chocolates and chatter about Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure "oshi" is the correct way to put it, but
as her trainer...
choice_data_list: Here, I've got some chocolate for you.
Here, I've got some chocolate for you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? Chocolate for... me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, WHAAAT?! CHOCOLAAATE?! FOR
MEEE?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what?! This is kinda out of nowhere! Why
are you putting me up on a pedestal like this?!
choice_data_list: Enjoy and keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is this all-encompassing love? Every
Valentine's Day, I'm just a plebeian spectator...
Do you really want to cheer me on?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But who else would simp for an Umamusume as
niche as me? I knew you were a die-hard Horsegirl fan!
A simp after my own heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're the model otaku! Today, you've given me
something even more important than chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can get through the next five or even ten
Valentine's if you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, let's continue offering up our love to Umas
together. Let's swear it on the shrine... t-together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Agnes Digital's insistence, I vow to support her
and her faves moving forward.
